description_long: This is a rustic wooden bench with a sturdy, rectangular seat made from three thick, weathered wooden planks. The bench is supported by two robust pedestal-style legs, each with a wide base for stability. On top of the bench, there is a metallic object resembling a medieval flail or mace, featuring a cylindrical wooden handle and a spiked metal head attached to a long chain. The wood of the bench appears aged and rough, with visible grain and some surface imperfections, suggesting outdoor use. The metal object on the bench has a dark, slightly reflective finish, contrasting with the matte, earthy tones of the wood. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for parks, gardens, or other outdoor urban environments.
description: A rustic wooden bench with thick planks and pedestal legs, featuring a medieval-style metal flail resting on top.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the thickness of the wooden planks and the flail's handle and head aligned along the bench.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bench, the three wooden planks, and the entire flail laid across the seat.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view highlighting the flail's head and chain, with the bench's pedestal leg visible.
description_view_3: Reverse side view showing the bench's length and the flail's handle and head from the opposite direction.
